footer.tagline: Connecting communities with food assistance across Birmingham.
home.hero.title: Feeding Birmingham, One Meal at a Time
home.hero.subtitle: Feed Birmingham connects local communities with food banks, hot meals, and delivery services across the city.
home.quick.find.sub: Locate your nearest food bank and get directions.
home.quick.delivery.sub: Can't travel? We deliver to those with accessibility needs.
home.quick.donate.sub: Donate food or funds to support the community.
home.quick.hotmeals.sub: View the weekly hot meal schedule near you.
home.schedule.title: This Week's Hot Meal Schedule
home.about.title: About Feed Birmingham
home.about.body: Our free web-based service helps Birmingham residents find food banks, request deliveries, and access essential food support — all in one place.
locations.hero.title: Find a Food Bank
locations.hero.subtitle: Find all food banks in Birmingham near you.
locations.map.hint: Enter a postcode to search nearby food banks
hotmeals.hero.title: Hot Meal Schedule
hotmeals.hero.subtitle: Free hot meals available across Birmingham every week.
hotmeals.info1: Free hot nutritious meals served weekly
hotmeals.note: Spaces are allocated on a first-come, first-served basis. No referral needed — just turn up. Spaces marked Full cannot accommodate new arrivals on that day.
delivery.hero.title: Delivery Service
delivery.hero.subtitle: Food delivery for Birmingham residents with accessibility needs.
delivery.form.title: Request a Delivery
delivery.form.subtitle: Fill in the form below and we will arrange delivery.

delivery.track.title: Track Your Delivery
delivery.track.subtitle: Enter your reference number to check your delivery status.

contact.form.subject: Subject
contact.form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.

donate.hero.subtitle: Your donation helps feed Birmingham families in need.
donate.section.title: Make a Difference Today
donate.type.food.sub: Drop off non-perishable food at a local collection point.
donate.type.volunteer.sub: Give your time to sort, pack, and deliver food parcels.
